source_intake_record.raw_question_text: <image_1> The structural formula of the glycinium cation is shown above. Arrows indicate the $pK_a$ values for the labile protons in the molecule. Which of the following is true about the geometry of the glycinium cation?
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: Both C atoms and both O atoms lie in the same plane.

choice_map.A: The leftmost C atom and all the atoms directly bonded to it lie in the same plane.
choice_map.B: Both C atoms and both O atoms lie in the same plane.
choice_map.D: The geometry around the N atom is planar.

extraction_notes: image_1 is a PIL image object placeholder, not a path or URL
